newsletter.title: Stay Tuned
newsletter.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive all the latest news, announcements, and updates about Start Lab.
newsletter.success_desc: You have successfully subscribed to the Start Lab newsletter. We will send you updates soon!
newsletter.error_desc: An error occurred. Please try again.

hero.subtitle: The first high-tech hub in the Goriška region, where children and youth transform curiosity into concrete digital solutions.

project.funding_text: The project is co-funded by the European Union from the Small Project Fund GO!2025 of the Interreg VI-A Italy-Slovenia 2021-2027 programme, managed by EGTC GO.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To become the Goriška hub of ideas, knowledge, and innovation, where future creators will develop talents from which future researchers, engineers, inventors, entrepreneurs, and technological breakthroughs will emerge.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: START LAB's mission is to bring science, technology, and innovation closer to children, pupils, and students – the future creators – and enable them to gain practical experience that formal education often does not provide. We believe that real knowledge is created when theory is connected with practice, research, and the creation of new ideas.

why.subtitle_rest: In the Goriška region , which would allow children and young people technology creation and development of their own ideas in the afternoon.

exploration.title: Independent Research
exploration.desc: Young people need the opportunity to try the equipment themselves. Only through practice do they recognize their path.

industry.title: Industry Connection
industry.desc: We enable direct contact with real challenges and experts from the local environment.

goal1.d: Developing digital skills and critical thinking.

goal2.d: Early detection of technical and engineering talents.

goal3.d: Support in the development of prototypes and own projects.

goal4.d: Strong network with elementary, secondary schools and universities.

goal5.d: Becoming a science center – also for regional tourism.

happening.badge: Buckle up: science is going full blast!
happening.title: What's happening in Start Lab?

items.d: Playful discovery of science and technology - safe, understandable and exciting.
In-depth programs to build confidence for technical professions.
Meetings with researchers and innovators about modern technology.
Getting to know professions and working environments in local companies.
Events that make science visible, tangible and attractive.

equipment.title: Science and Technology Center
equipment.intro: Across 350 m² of modern, fully-equipped spaces, we merge creativity, technology, and practical learning. The Center features:
list: 3D printers for prototype and model fabrication
Laser cutter for precise material processing
Technical workshop with drills, saws, and other tools
Laboratory for electrical engineering and electronics
10 workstations for programming, electrical engineering, and robotics classes
VR center with virtual reality goggles and simulators
equipment.outro: The Center is dedicated to education, research, prototype development, and exploring modern technologies for all generations.

rooms.r4: Exhibition area of local patents and innovations
rooms.r5: Exhibition space of local companies (panels on the staircase)
rooms.r8: Safe and fun driving simulator – cars
rooms.interactive_hint: Click on the numbers on the floor plan to inspect each room!

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: What our young researchers create with their hands.

partners.title: SUPPORT ORGANIZATIONS
partners.subtitle: Municipalities, schools, faculties, development agencies, technology parks, research institutions, associations and other organizations that through cooperation and support help create a developmental environment for youth.

item_ung.name: UNG
item_ung.label: Research Partner
item_ung.desc: of the University of Nova Gorica is an internationally recognized research laboratory in the field of advanced materials, organic electronics and nanotechnologies. Under the leadership of Prof. Dr. Egon Pavlica, it connects scientific research with innovations. The laboratory's researchers will conduct workshops as part of Start Lab to bring modern technologies and scientific research closer to young people.

item_ptp.name: PTP
item_ptp.label: Entrepreneurial Partner
item_ptp.desc: Primorska Technology Park (PTP) and Start Lab complement each other content-wise. PTP offers young people business development of ideas into entrepreneurial stories and organizes the POPRI youth business competition, while Start Lab offers technical mentoring and workshops to turn ideas into prototypes.

item_ehisa.name: E-House
item_ehisa.label: Scientific Partner
item_ehisa.desc: e-House conducts workshops during school hours across primary schools, bringing school students closer to science through experiments. Start Lab hosts workshops at a fixed Solkan makerspace with a fully-equipped lab for advanced, in-depth afternoon work. We act complementarily to expand STEM learning.

item_mic.name: IL MIC
item_mic.fullName: Inter-Enterprise Education Center Innovation Lab (IL MIC)
item_mic.label: Technical Partner
item_mic.desc: IL MIC operates during school hours (until 3 PM), allowing Nova Gorica School Center school children to gain practical skills on custom hardware. Start Lab is open after 4 PM, offering a creative makerspace for self-directed research, prototyping, and design. They work together as formal and extracurricular upgrades.

for_companies.title: For Companies
for_companies.desc: We invite companies to co-create workshops, team-buildings and invest in the region's future personnel. Become part of the open developmental environment in Goriška.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle_page: Get in touch with us for any questions, registration info, or potential collaborations.

workshops_page.subtitle: Choose your exploration path. From digital production to the most advanced technologies.
workshops_page.help_text: If you are not sure which workshop is suitable for your child, contact us at info@startlab.si.

3d-print.title: 3D Printing – from idea to product
3d-print.desc: Learn the process from 3D modeling to the final product using 3D printers.

laser.title: Laser Cutting – from drawing to product
laser.desc: Learn how to prepare laser cutting plans and create unique products.

3d-pro.title: Professional 3D Modeling
3d-pro.desc: Learn advanced tools for 3D modeling and engineering design.

electronics-basic.title: Electronics Basics – DC circuits
electronics-basic.desc: Participants learn basic components and laws of electricity and assemble simple circuits.

arduino-micro.title: Microcontrollers and Programming (Arduino)
arduino-micro.desc: Participants create an interactive project with sensors and actuators.

smart-home.title: Smart Homes
smart-home.desc: How smart devices and automation work in practice.

mobile-app.title: Create Your Own Mobile App
mobile-app.desc: Turn an idea into a simple mobile application and test it.

unreal-engine.title: Video Game Development (Unreal Engine)
unreal-engine.desc: Create a basic 3D environment and understand how games are made.

vr-worlds.title: VR – Virtual Reality
vr-worlds.desc: Experience virtual environments and interactive worlds.

disassemble-create.title: Disassemble and Create
disassemble-create.desc: Creative technique: from old devices to new inventions.

long-term-project.title: Long-term Project Workshop
long-term-project.desc: From idea to solution through prototyping and testing.

graphene-transistor.title: Graphene Transistor Fabrication
graphene-transistor.desc: Practical workshop on making a transistor in cooperation with UNG at the Start Lab premises in Solkan.

partner_page.subtitle: Start Lab is an open developmental environment where youth in Goriška discover their talents. Together we build a space for future innovators.
partner_page.devs_subtitle: Don't wait for the talents of the future – co-create them today. START LAB provides you with direct contact with young talents, a presentation of your company, and active participation in the development of future staff for your needs and technologies.
partner_page.devs_colab_desc: With your support, you directly invest in the knowledge of youth in Goriška. Talent developers provide financial means for materials, lab operations and professional equipment.
partner_page.devs_expertise_placeholder: e.g. Gold developer, general sponsorship, equipment purchase...
partner_page.devs_message_placeholder: Describe your interest in sponsorship or cooperation as a talent developer...
partner_page.devs_agreement: By submitting the form, you agree to the storage of data for the purpose of establishing sponsorship or talent developer status.
partner_page.devs_offer_desc: Visibility of your brand across all our events and materials, the opportunity to connect with exceptional young talents, and direct social responsibility in the local environment.
partner_page.mentors_subtitle: Share your expertise and experience with young minds and help co-create the future of technological progress in Goriška.
partner_page.mentors_colab_desc: Through mentoring, you directly influence the development of local talents, pass on valuable experience, and help build a strong technological community.
partner_page.mentors_offer_desc: Flexible participation in exciting projects with youth (robotics, programming, 3D printing, electronics), holding workshops, and networking with other professionals.
partner_page.mentors_form_title: Become a Mentor at Start Lab
partner_page.mentors_expertise_placeholder: e.g., embedded systems, Python, 3D modeling, robotics...
partner_page.mentors_message_placeholder: Describe your experience and how you would like to help young talents...
partner_page.mentors_agreement: By submitting the form, you agree to the storage of data for the purpose of establishing mentorship at Start Lab.
partner_page.benefit_subtitle: Access to talent and strong local promotion.
partner_page.goal_subtitle: To create an environment where talent stays at home.
partner_page.quote: "If we want talent to stay in Goriška, we must together create an environment today where it can arise."
partner_page.message_placeholder: Describe how you would like to participate...
partner_page.agreement: By submitting the form, you agree that Start Lab uses your data for the purpose of establishing a partnership.
partner_page.callback: We will contact you as soon as possible.

calendar_page.subtitle: Stay up to date with all workshops, lectures and events in our laboratory.

mentors.title: Start Lab Mentors
mentors.subtitle: Experts and visionaries sharing knowledge and inspiring the next generation of innovators.

uros.desc:
Uroš Polanc is a development engineer, mentor, creator, and visionary who has been inspiring young people about technology, innovation, and entrepreneurship for many years. He gained his rich experience as a FABLAB manager, technical subject teacher, development engineer, and leader of numerous international projects in the field of digital technologies, prototyping, and youth education.

In his career, he has led hundreds of workshops for children, high school students, teachers, and companies in the fields of 3D printing, robotics, electronics, programming, video game development, virtual reality, and entrepreneurship. He pays special attention to creating a safe, encouraging, and creative environment where young people can develop their ideas, gain confidence, and learn through practical work.

As a mentor, he believes that every child has the potential for great things if given the right environment, support, and opportunity to explore. That's why he combines modern technologies, creativity, teamwork, and solving real-life challenges in his work.

His projects are characterized by innovation, connecting education with the economy, and developing future competences. He has led international hackathons, European projects, the development of virtual learning environments, and numerous initiatives that bring the world of technology closer to young people in a fun and inspiring way.

borut.desc:
Borut Fiorelli is an educator, mentor, and pioneer of introducing robotics into primary school education in the Goriška region. At Dornberk Primary School, he has been teaching technology, computer science, and elective subjects Robotics in Technology and Electronics with Robotics for many years, bringing programming, automation, electronics, and modern technologies closer to students.

As a mentor to numerous teams in the POPRI youth entrepreneurship competition, he successfully encourages innovation, creativity, and entrepreneurial thinking among young people. His mentees regularly develop innovative projects and rank among the best teams in Slovenia.

Technical projects and competitions hold a special place in his work. In the national Elastomobil competition, organized by the House of Experiments, students under his mentorship achieved several outstanding results, including 3rd and 4th place, as well as receiving the expert commission's award for the most imaginative technical solution. Over the years, teams from Dornberk Primary School have consistently won top spots and special recognition for innovation and technical excellence at Elastomobil.

In addition to his school work, he has collaborated with the Ljudska Univerza Nova Gorica (People's University of Nova Gorica), where he conducted educational programs in digital competencies and advanced software applications. His work connects engineering, entrepreneurship, innovation, and lifelong learning, inspiring young people to create the solutions of the future.

egon.desc:
Dr. Egon Pavlica is a physicist, researcher, professor, and Dean of the School of Science at the University of Nova Gorica. His research work on advanced materials, nanoelectronics, organic semiconductors, and innovative technologies ranks him among the leading Slovenian researchers in physical materials science. He is the author of numerous scientific publications in prestigious international journals and collaborates on various European research projects.

As a mentor, he fosters curiosity, a research-oriented approach, and the development of innovative ideas. He helps youth grasp how scientific breakthroughs translate into technological solutions with real-world impact on society and the economy. Through his work, he blends research excellence, entrepreneurship, and the development of high-tech products, representing a crucial bridge between academia and industry.

nik.desc:
Nik Tominec is an electronics engineer, maker, and technology enthusiast who pushes the boundaries of modern engineering with his knowledge and passion. As an expert in electronics and digital fabrication, he combines theoretical precision with a strong practical sense to create advanced technical solutions.

His activities cover a wide range of modern technologies. He specializes in the development, design, and layout of electronic circuits, turning complex ideas into functional prototypes. He complements his engineering expertise with a deep understanding of 3D printing and 3D modeling, enabling full project development – from the initial on-screen schematic to the final physical product.

He places a special emphasis on advanced smart home systems and comprehensive IT/network infrastructure. Professionally, he focuses on designing and optimizing stable internet and Wi-Fi networks, integrating modern security and camera systems, and automating living spaces. He links all these networks and devices into intelligent, secure, and efficient systems, supported in the background by testing in his own home lab (self-hosting). As a multi-talented tech specialist, he constantly researches new technologies and tackles complex hardware and software challenges.

As a visionary, he believes that the true power of technology lies in its practical understanding and solving everyday problems. Therefore, his projects are marked by a high level of innovation, precise execution, and a constant drive to explore new technical horizons, actively helping to shape the future of both the digital and analog worlds.

kevin.desc:
Kevin Peršolja is a master's student of electronics at the Faculty of Electrical Engineering in Ljubljana and a passionate maker, driven by a constant curiosity about how technology works behind the scenes. He is at his best at the intersection of hardware and software, where he effortlessly blends academic knowledge with a highly hands-on approach to problem-solving.

At the core of his engineering expertise is custom printed circuit board (PCB) design and development. He excels at turning complex ideas from basic concepts into carefully designed and manufactured hardware. But for him, creating a physical circuit board is only the first step. With his programming skills, he writes the code that breathes life into the boards, perfectly bridging analog components with the digital world to create functioning embedded systems.

As a mentor, he brings an energetic and highly practical approach to the lab. He firmly believes that the most effective way to understand modern technology is through active experimentation, whether it is soldering a demanding component, debugging software code, or troubleshooting a prototype.

By sharing his technical knowledge and practical experience, he aims to inspire creators of all ages. He encourages young people, from curious children and high school students to his fellow academic peers, to tackle engineering challenges with confidence, helping them turn their boldest technological ideas into reality.

talent_developers.title: Talent Developers
talent_developers.subtitle: Talent developers are companies and individuals who want to be recognized among young talents, introduce their activities and opportunities to them, and build their reputation by contributing to the development of future experts, innovation, and the region.

itech.desc: Instrumentation Technologies is a Solkan-based high-tech company that develops instruments for high-speed signal acquisition and processing, and low-latency SDR solutions. Their instruments are used by leading research institutes and industrial organizations in the most technologically demanding environments in the world, such as particle accelerators, neutron diagnostics, water desalination systems, and quantum technologies. Founded in 1998, the company currently employs around 60 experts, combining multidisciplinary knowledge in electronics, FPGA development, signal processing, and system integration.

siq.desc: SIQ Ljubljana is an international, professional, independent, impartial, and non-profit institution providing complete solutions in the fields of product testing, certification, metrology, and management systems. It is a notified body for 7 directives and 2 regulations, and accredited for more than 500 standards. With 184 employees and 350 external experts, it operates in various industries, serving clients from more than 60 countries.

shelly.desc: Shelly Group is one of the leading European technology companies in the field of Internet of Things (IoT) and smart energy management. With its innovative solutions for smart homes, commercial buildings, and energy efficiency, it enables digital transformation for millions of users worldwide. Present in over 100 countries, the company sets new standards in automation, connectivity, and sustainable energy management with its advanced technology.

ka3.desc: KA3 d.o.o. is a family-owned company from Ajdovščina with over 20 years of tradition in the wholesale and retail of auto cosmetics, car equipment, spare parts, and professional tools. With high-quality products, professional advice, and reliable delivery, they build long-term partnerships with businesses and final customers.

gorenje_gsi.desc: Gorenje GSI, d.o.o., a part of the Hisense Europe group, manages the marketing, sales, and after-sales services for Gorenje, Hisense, and Asko brands on the Slovenian market. The company combines wholesale, retail, and service, providing comprehensive, high-quality solutions for the home. With an expert team, it builds long-term partnerships, enhances user experience, actively contributes to the development of the local environment, and supports sustainable community initiatives.

a2r.desc: A2R d.o.o. is a specialized company for the sale of premium automotive and motorcycle motorsport equipment. As the official representative of the Sparco brand, it offers racing seats, safety gear, racing apparel, helmets, safety systems, and other professional solutions for racers. The company introduces youth to the world of motorsport, advanced technology, engine science, and safety innovations, fostering interest in technical professions and the development of new solutions.

amiteh.desc: Amiteh, merilni sistemi, d.o.o., is a well-known Slovenian supplier of modern measuring instruments from Keysight, Rigol, Itech, Micsig, GW Instek, Tekbox, GuideIR, and others. We provide our customers with reliable measuring systems, expert support, and custom solutions, thereby contributing to higher efficiency, precision, and safety in industrial operations, advanced prototype developments, as well as in the hands of home creators.

seo.home_desc: Start Lab Science and Adventure Center is an innovative hub in Nova Gorica / Goriška region, where curiosity meets tech learning. We offer advanced 3D printing, laser cutting, and coding workshops for kids & youth.
